data.name: Christmas Adventure
data.detailed_description:
You are used to spend your vacations in a mountain village. Three girls live in it. Margo is a sultry milf, Sasha and Tasha are young girls. On your last visit, they ordered you outfits for the Christmas party. You remembered what to buy, but you forgot who ordered what outfit.

In this Visual Novel, the deciding factor for changing the story is the player's choice. You have to correctly guess which party outfit the girl needs. Depending on the correctness of your choice, you will get scenes with one, two or three girls.

The visual novel is not very long, but has Seven different story endings.
data.about_the_game:
You are used to spend your vacations in a mountain village. Three girls live in it. Margo is a sultry milf, Sasha and Tasha are young girls. On your last visit, they ordered you outfits for the Christmas party. You remembered what to buy, but you forgot who ordered what outfit.

In this Visual Novel, the deciding factor for changing the story is the player's choice. You have to correctly guess which party outfit the girl needs. Depending on the correctness of your choice, you will get scenes with one, two or three girls.

The visual novel is not very long, but has Seven different story endings.
data.short_description: Welcome to the Christmas adventure. In this game you have to guess the girls' outfit for Christmas celebration. If you get it right, you are in for a naughty Christmas night.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
